verses.text: Zion a kihotkhiatna thu khuavak bangin a taan'khiat mateng, ama gualzawhna thu meivak kuang bangin a taan'khiat matengin, Zion ka ngaihsutna-in gamdai takin ka om mawk kei ding a, Jerusalem ka ngaihsutna-in ka khawl mawk kei ding hi
Minamte in na gualzawhna mu ding uh a, kumpi khempeuh in na minthan'na mu ding uh hi. Topa in nang a hong phuah min thak tawh nang hong kisam ding hi
Nang pen Topa-a' dingin hotkhiatna lukhu, na Pasian-a' dingin kumpi lukhu tawh na kibang ding hi

Nang pen a kinusia, hong kici nawnlo ding a, na leitang pen Gamkhing, kici nawnlo ding hi. Nang pen ama tungah ka lungkimna om, hong kici ding a, na leitang pen a Kiten'pih, kici ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh nang tungah Topa lungkim a, na leitang pen a kiten'pih zi tawh kibang ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh tangval in nungak khat a ten'pih mah bangin nang hong lampa in nang hong ten'pih ding a, zipipa mothaknu tungah a lungdam mah bangin nang tungah na Pasian lungdam ding hi

Jerusalem aw, na kulhte tungah galvilte ka koih khin a, sun tawntung leh zan tawntungin amaute gamdai ngeilo ding uh hi. Amaute in a thuciamna Topa phawksak ding uh a, amah in Jerusalem kipsakin leitung mite' phat dingin a bawlkik matengin amaute khawllo ding uh hi
Topa in limtakin thuciamna bawl khinzo a, a vangliatna tawh tungsak ding hi. “Na galte' an dingin na ante ka piakik nawn kei ding a, nangma sepsa leenggahzu gamdang mite in dawn nawnlo ding hi
Ahih hangin an a kholte in ne-in Topa na phat ding uh a, a kaikhawmte in keima biakinn huang sungah a dawn ding uh hi,” ci hi
Jerusalem mite aw, kulhkongpite panin paikhia un la a hong ciahkik na mipihte uh-a' dingin lam bawlkhol un. Lam zik un; lam lianpi zikin suangtumte paikhia un la, mite' muh dingin lim khat khaito un
Leimong dongah Topa taangko khin hi. Jerusalem mite tungah, “En un, no hong honkhiapa hong pai hi. Ama sep thaman a mite hong pua a, a gualzawhna thaman a mite hong masuan hi,” ci un
Amaute pen A Siangtho Mi, Topa' Hotkhiatte kici ding a, nang pen a Kizongkhia, a kinusialo khuapi, hong kici ding hi.
